create_contract.description: Build a legally-sound Thai rental contract step by step.
create_contract.tenant_blank_note: Tenant name and ID will be left blank for paper fill-in after printing.
create_contract.tm30_description: Thai law requires landlords to file a TM.30 form with Immigration within 24 hours of a foreign tenant moving in. This must be re-filed each time the tenant re-enters Thailand. The contract will include this obligation.
tm30.title: TM.30 Form Generator
tm30.subtitle: Pre-fill and print a TM.30 form for Immigration filing.
tm30.info_description: Thai law requires property owners to notify Immigration within 24 hours when a foreign national moves in. You can file online or print this form and submit in person.

templates.title: Contract Templates
home.hero_title: Rental management built for Thai landlords
home.hero_subtitle: Upload contracts, track payments, automate penalties, and file TM.30s — all in one place, in Thai and English.
home.features_title: Everything you need to manage rentals
home.features_subtitle: From contract upload to TM.30 filings — purpose-built for Thai rental law and workflows.
home.feature_ocr_desc: Scan or upload Thai rental contracts and extract key terms automatically.
home.feature_ai_desc: Detect risky clauses and get plain-language summaries in Thai and English.
home.feature_payments_desc: Track rent, utilities, deposits, and late fees across all your properties.
home.feature_penalties_desc: Set custom penalty rules that trigger automatically on overdue payments.
home.feature_maintenance_desc: Assign technicians, track repair costs, and monitor SLAs end-to-end.
home.feature_tm30_desc: Auto-generate and print TM.30 reports for foreign tenants — legally compliant.
home.pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
home.pricing_no_flow: Rent never flows through RentOS. You collect rent directly from tenants.
home.built_body: RentOS is designed around Thai rental law, Thai contract formats, and the workflows Thai landlords actually use. Full bilingual support — every screen in Thai and English.
home.built_tm30: TM.30 filing support for foreign tenants
home.built_ocr: Thai contract OCR and clause detection
home.built_law: Aligned with Thai Civil and Commercial Code
home.built_made_in: Made in Thailand · สร้างในประเทศไทย

landing.hero_badge: Free for landlords · Built for Thailand
landing.hero_sub: Whether you own the place or you live in it, RentOS helps you understand your contract, track your obligations, and stop guessing.
landing.hero_trust_line: Start free — 2 properties, no credit card.
landing.hero_quote_1_text: I finally understood my Thai lease — every clause in English, right there on my phone.
landing.hero_quote_2_text: The system is really helpful — I can track contracts and TM30 all in one place. I don’t stress about paperwork anymore.
landing.problem_h2: Renting in Thailand is complicated. It doesn't have to be.
landing.for_both_h2: Built for both sides of the lease.
landing.for_both_sub: Renting has two sides. Both deserve clarity.
landing.landlord_item_1: Know what every clause in your lease actually says
landing.landlord_item_2: Track penalty conditions before they become disputes
landing.landlord_item_3: Log maintenance requests — nothing gets lost in LINE
landing.landlord_item_4: Never miss a TM30 filing deadline
landing.tenant_item_1: See your contract in plain language — Thai and English
landing.tenant_item_2: Know your rent date, notice period, and what triggers penalties
landing.tenant_item_3: Submit maintenance requests with a full paper trail
landing.tenant_item_4: Search your lease for any clause, condition, or keyword
landing.features_sub: No jargon. No complexity. Just the things that make renting less of a headache.
landing.feature_1_desc: Upload a Thai lease. Get every clause in plain language — both Thai and English. Know what you signed up for.
landing.feature_2_desc: Penalty clauses, notice periods, deposit rules — all listed clearly so there are no surprises at checkout.
landing.feature_3_desc: Every request, response, and resolution — logged, dated, and available if you ever need to refer back to it.
landing.feature_4_desc: Automatic reminders for Thai government foreigner-reporting. Built in from day one, zero configuration needed.
landing.feature_5_desc: Log when rent was paid and how. A clean record that both sides can refer to — no more disputes.
landing.feature_6_desc: The whole app works in both languages. Landlord speaks Thai, tenant speaks English? No problem.
landing.testimonial_1_quote: I used to dread my landlord conversations because my Thai isn't perfect. Now I can check the contract myself and know exactly where I stand.
landing.testimonial_2_quote: “TM30 used to be such a headache. RentOS makes it so much easier — I always get reminded before the deadline.”
landing.testimonial_3_quote: The maintenance log has saved me twice already. When the tenant claimed we never fixed something, I had the whole history right there.
landing.pricing_sub: Start free. Pay only when you grow.
landing.plan_free_items: Manage up to 2 properties forever|Contracts, payments & maintenance tracking|Tenant portal included — always free for tenants|Thai/English/Chinese interface|AI contract parsing (alpha bonus)|Upgrade with slot packs or Pro anytime
landing.plan_pro_items: AI contract generation, Q&A, and analysis|Portfolio automation: bulk actions, penalty rules, smart reminders|Analytics dashboard, template library, and full document vault|Everything in Free|Priority email support
landing.pricing_note: No automatic rent collection · No hidden fees · No surprises
landing.cta_band_h2: You deserve to understand where you live.
landing.cta_band_sub: Start free with 2 properties. No credit card, no commitment.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you might want to know before you sign up.
faq.q1_question: Is RentOS a real estate agency?
faq.q1_answer: No. RentOS is property management software — a tool you run yourself. We are not an agent, broker, or property manager. We do not represent landlords or tenants, show properties, or handle any transactions. We just make the admin work easier.
faq.q2_answer: Thai, English, and Simplified Chinese — with Thai as co-primary language. You can switch languages at any time. We designed the app for the Thai market first, so Thai-language support is treated equally alongside English, not as an afterthought.
faq.q3_answer: Yes, and it is completely free for tenants. Once a landlord sets up a contract on RentOS, they can pair the tenant to it. Tenants then see their payment schedule, submit maintenance requests, and view their lease details — without needing to pay anything.
faq.q4_question: How accurate is the AI contract parsing?
faq.q4_answer: Best-effort. Our AI reads your uploaded PDF or image and extracts key terms: rent amount, due date, deposit, lease period, penalty clauses, notice period. It is usually right, but it can miss details or misread handwritten text. You must review the parsed results against your original contract before relying on them.
faq.q5_answer: No. RentOS is a software tool, not a law firm. The contract data you see in the app is parsed by AI for convenience — it is not a legal summary or legal opinion. For questions about your legal rights or obligations under a contract, consult a licensed Thai attorney.
faq.q6_question: Does RentOS collect my rent money?
faq.q6_answer: No — and this is by design. Rent money always flows directly between tenant and landlord, outside RentOS entirely. We track the schedule, send reminders, and let both parties record when payment happens. We never hold, process, or touch any money. RentOS is not a payment processor.
faq.q7_question: What if a tenant pays late? Does RentOS charge them?
faq.q7_answer: No. RentOS can track a late payment, log a penalty per your contract terms, and notify the tenant — but the actual collection of any overdue amounts is between you and your tenant. RentOS records the situation; you handle the conversation.
faq.q8_question: Does RentOS file TM30 reports with Immigration for me?
faq.q8_answer: No. Under Thailand's Immigration Act Section 38, the legal obligation to notify Immigration belongs to you, the landlord or property owner — it cannot be delegated to a software platform. RentOS sends you a reminder when a foreign tenant arrives and helps you prepare the report. You file it with your local Immigration office.
faq.q9_question: Is my data safe? What does RentOS do with it?
faq.q9_answer: Your data is stored securely in Supabase (encrypted Postgres). We comply with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA). We do not sell your data to third parties. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data at any time. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
faq.q10_question: What happens when I hit the free 2-slot limit?
faq.q10_answer: You have two options: buy a one-time slot pack (฿99 for +1 slot, ฿399 for +5, ฿699 for +10 — permanent, no recurring fee), or subscribe to Pro at ฿199/month for AI contract tools, portfolio automation, and analytics. Slots you purchase are yours permanently and do not expire if you cancel Pro.
faq.q11_question: Can I cancel my Pro subscription?
faq.q11_answer: Yes, at any time. Your Pro benefits continue until the end of your current billing period — we do not prorate but we do not lock you in. When you cancel, you revert to free tier. Any slot packs you purchased separately remain active regardless of your subscription status.
faq.q12_question: Is there a founding member deal?
faq.q12_answer: RentOS is currently in beta. Free tier is available now with no time limit. When we sunset the free tier (after 100 active landlords), beta users who signed up early will be offered a founding member rate of ฿199/month — locked for life. We will give at least 30 days notice before any pricing change.
disclaimer.footer_text: RentOS parses contract data using AI — always verify against your original document. This is not legal or financial advice. RentOS does not collect, hold, or transfer rent money; all payments remain between landlord and tenant. TM30 filing is the landlord's legal responsibility under Thailand Immigration Act Section 38; RentOS provides reminders only. Service provided as-is; liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by Thai law. Your data is protected under Thailand's PDPA.
